A Warm Welcome

Glad to Have
You Here

Welcome to Leah's Test Property — we are so delighted to host you at our San Diego retreat. Every detail of this space has been thoughtfully curated to ensure your stay is seamless, comfortable, and truly memorable.

Whether you are here for a weekend escape or an extended California adventure, please treat this home as your own. From the sparkling pool to the private spa, every amenity is yours to enjoy.

This guidebook is your complete companion throughout your stay. We hope you love it here as much as we do.

— Leah

What's Included

Property
Amenities

🏊

Private Pool

Resort-style pool with water features, sun loungers, and ambient night lighting. Available 8AM–10PM.

♨️

Private Spa / Hot Tub

Heated spa tub with adjustable jets, perfect for an evening unwind under the open sky.

🎾

Tennis Court

Full-size private tennis court with equipment provided. Ideal for a morning match or evening game.

🍽️

Outdoor Dining

Al fresco dining area with a premium BBQ grill, patio table, and string lights for ambience.

🕹️

Arcade Room

A curated selection of arcade games and entertainment — fun for guests of all ages.

🎬

Movie Hall

Private home cinema with a large projection screen, surround sound, and cosy seating.

☕

Fully Equipped Kitchen

Espresso machine, cookware, and all essentials for a home-cooked meal.

📶

High-Speed Wi-Fi

Fibre connection throughout the entire property. Password found in the Wi-Fi section below.

🛏️

Premium Bedding

Hotel-grade linens, pillows, and towels freshly laundered for your arrival.

Location

Find
Us Here

Leah's Test Property is located in San Diego, California — close to world-class beaches, dining, and entertainment.

Getting Here

Arrival
Directions

  • 01
    From San Diego International Airport (SAN)

    The airport is approximately 15–20 minutes from the property. Take a taxi, Uber, or Lyft and share our address: 122345 San Diego, California. Alternatively, rental cars are available at the airport terminal.

  • 02
    By Private Vehicle

    Enter "122345 San Diego, CA" into your GPS. Once on the street, look for the property gate. Private parking is available on the driveway — please park within the designated area only.

  • 03
    Check-In Instructions

    Check-in is from 3:00 PM onwards. A key lockbox is located at the front entrance. Your unique code will be sent via Airbnb message 24 hours before your arrival.

  • 04
    Check-Out

    Check-out is by 11:00 AM. Please leave the keys on the kitchen counter and pull the front door closed behind you. No need to strip the beds — our team will handle everything.

Connectivity

Wi-Fi
Access

LeahsProperty_5G
Welcome2024!

For the fastest connection, use the 5G network. A 2.4G network (LeahsProperty_2G) is also available with the same password for older devices.

Important

House
Rules

No Smoking

Strictly no smoking inside the property. A designated outdoor area is available. A deep-cleaning fee applies if this rule is violated.

Quiet Hours

Please observe quiet hours between 10:00 PM and 8:00 AM out of respect for our neighbours.

Pool & Spa Safety

No unsupervised children in the pool or spa. No glass near the pool area. Pool hours are 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM.

No Unregistered Guests

The property accommodates only the number of guests declared at booking. Overnight guests must be pre-approved.

Events & Parties

No events, parties, or gatherings are permitted on the premises. Airbnb's party policy is strictly enforced.

Treat It Like Home

Please treat the property with care and report any damage promptly. We are understanding — accidents happen.

Local Favourites

Where to
Dine

San Diego has a world-class dining scene. Here are our personal favourites — from fresh seafood to vibrant rooftop bars.

Fine Dining

Addison

San Diego's only Michelin-starred restaurant. An extraordinary tasting menu experience. Reserve well in advance.

⟶ 15 min drive

Seafood

Coasterra

Stunning waterfront Mexican seafood on Harbor Island. Unbeatable views of the San Diego skyline at sunset.

⟶ 20 min drive

Casual

The Patio on Lamont

A Pacific Beach neighbourhood gem with excellent brunch, craft cocktails, and a relaxed garden atmosphere.

⟶ 10 min drive

Rooftop Bar

The Nolen

Rooftop bar with sweeping downtown views, creative cocktails, and a sophisticated crowd. Great for sunset drinks.

⟶ 18 min drive

Brunch

Morning Glory

San Diego's most celebrated brunch spot. Creative dishes, excellent coffee, and a lively Little Italy atmosphere.

⟶ 15 min drive

Tacos

Oscar's Mexican Seafood

A San Diego institution. The freshest fish tacos in the city, beloved by locals for decades.

⟶ 12 min drive

Your Safety

Emergency
Information

Your safety is our highest priority. Please familiarise yourself with the information below at the start of your stay.

🚨
Emergency Numbers

Emergency (Police / Fire / Medical): 911
Non-emergency Police: (619) 531-2000

🏥
Nearest Hospital

UC San Diego Medical Center and Scripps Mercy Hospital are the nearest major hospitals, both within 15 minutes by car.

🔥
Fire Safety

A fire extinguisher is located under the kitchen sink. Smoke detectors are installed in every room. Exit routes are clearly marked.

💊
First Aid Kit

A fully stocked first aid kit is located in the main bathroom cabinet. Please inform us if any supplies are used during your stay.

📞
Host Contact — Leah

Available 24/7 via Airbnb message. For urgent matters, call or text: +1 (XXX) XXX-XXXX

🌊
Natural Disaster Protocol

In the event of an earthquake or wildfire, follow San Diego County emergency guidance at readysandiego.org and local evacuation routes.
